title: atrostemma manarae
intro: Atrostemma manarae is a plant species belonging to the family Melastomataceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Atrostemma manarae include reducing fever, treating wounds, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Atrostemma manarae typically involve making decoctions or infusions from its leaves and roots, which can be consumed as tea or used topically as a poultice.
